case_title: ZEYU LUO VS. MCDONALD'S RESTAURANTS OF CALIFORNIA, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) {T. ROETHER} FILED BY DEFENDANT MCDONALD'S RESTAURANTS OF CALIFORNIA, INC.
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF LUO, ZEYU
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUO, ZEYU

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-13-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-13-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF ZEYU LUO IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM AND ASSISTED BY PROVISIONALLY QUALIFIED CANTONESE COURT INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT MCDONALD'S RESTAURANTS OF CALIFORNIA IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM, REPRESENTED BY TAMMY ROETHER, RISK MANAGEMENT. SC-109 IS REQUIRED FROM THE DEFENDANT AND DEFENDANT HAS EMAILED TO DEPT506 CLERK DURING THE PROCEEDING. COURT FILED THE RECEIVED SC-109 RECEIVED FROM THE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. COURT ORDERS CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT OPERATE THE RESTAURANT IN CLAIM. JUDGEPROTEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY LUO, ZEYU AS TO DEFENDANT MCDONALD'S RESTAURANTS OF CALIFORNIA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) [HEARING: 11/17/22 AT 1:30PM] FILED BY DEFENDANT MCDONALD'S RESTAURANTS OF CALIFORNIA, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO JAN-13-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES. CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUO, ZEYU
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30) SERVED OCT-12-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCDONALD'S RESTAURANTS OF CALIFORNIA, INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUO, ZEYU
ORDER REGARD: REQUEST TO APPEAR ATTHE HEARING BY ZOOM(PLAINTIFF)*GRANTED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY LUO, ZEYU MCDONALD'S RESTAURANTS OF CALIFORNIA, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-13-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUO, ZEYU IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MCDONALD'S RESTAURANTS OF CALIFORNIA, INC. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) TAMMY ROETHER, RISK MANAGEMENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT MCDONALD'S RESTAURANTS OF CALIFORNIA, INC.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. [HEARING: NOV-17-22 AT 1:30PM]
